[[Asteroid 426]] was one of the [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroids]] which orbited [[Sarapin/Legends|Sarapin]]. It was part of the defense grid the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] used to defend the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. The defense grid was taken out by [[Sev'rance Tann/Legends|Sev'rance Tann]].

[[File:Asteroid_426_Power_Relay.jpg|thumb|left|200px|[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] forces [[Battle of Asteroid 426|defending]] the Power Relay on Asteroid 426.]]

{{Ast-stub}}
